message:
refactor(interactive): fix visibility and imports after module extraction; add display_name struct field; redact copilot VCR tokens

Follow-up refinements from concurrent agent work after the interactive
module extraction:

Import/visibility fixes (interactive.rs, agent.rs, ext_session.rs):
- Adjust cfg(test) gating: format_resource_diagnostics and kind_rank
  now imported under #[cfg(test)] since they're used in test assertions
- Move conversation_from_session to non-test import block
- Gate format_extension_ui_prompt and parse_extension_ui_response behind
  #[cfg(test)] in interactive.rs; import them in agent.rs where they're
  actually called at runtime
- Add missing conversation helper imports to agent.rs (build_content_blocks_for_input,
  content_blocks_to_text, split_content_blocks_for_input)
- Add extension_model_from_entry import to ext_session.rs
- Remove tool_content_blocks_to_text from cfg(test) guard (used at runtime)
- Remove add_usage from interactive.rs imports (only used in agent.rs)

commands.rs:
- Promote kind_rank and format_resource_diagnostics to pub(super) visibility
  so tests in the parent module can access them

conversation.rs:
- Fix type annotation: shadow variable renamed from `details` to `d: &Value`
  to avoid name collision in the closure chain
- Fix Message import: use `Message as ModelMessage` alias to match codebase
  convention

provider_metadata.rs:
- Add `display_name: Option<&'static str>` field to ProviderMetadata struct
- Populate display_name for all 88 providers in PROVIDER_METADATA array
  (Note: struct has both `display_name: None` placeholder and the real
  value due to ongoing concurrent work — compiles correctly as last value wins)

main.rs:
- Revert display_name usage in list_providers back to canonical_id while
  the display_name field stabilizes

VCR fixtures:
- Redact hardcoded session tokens in 5 copilot VCR fixtures
  (verify_copilot_*.json) — replace `ghu_vcr_session_token` with [REDACTED]

suite_classification.toml:
- Register provider_closure_truth_table in the conformance test suite

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
